{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hassel
|pkmn=Baxcalibur
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Ice
|img=Hassel Baxcalibur.png
|epnum=HZ055
|epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four
|vajp=List of Japanese voice actors{{!}}Yuki Onodera
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Baxcalibur}} is Hassel's second known Pokémon and his main battling partner. It was used alongside Flapple against [[Roy's Fuecoco]] and [[Brassius]]'s {{p|Dolliv}}, eventually winning the battle.

In ''[[HZ127|The Training Royale!]]'', Baxcalibur was used to battle against [[Ult]], where it battled against Ult's {{p|Dragonite}} and won.

Baxcalibur's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Glaive Rush}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, and {{m|Protect}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Thermal Exchange}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hassel
|pkmn=Flapple
|type1=Grass
|type2=Dragon
|img=Hassel Flapple.png
|epnum=HZ055
|epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Flapple}} is Hassel's third known Pokémon. It was used to battle against [[Roy]] and [[Brassius]] alongside Baxcalibur, being on the winning side when its partner defeated both of their opponents.

Flapple's known moves are {{m|Acid Spray}}, {{m|Grav Apple}}, {{m|Twister}}, and {{m|Protect}}.}}
